\tzpentry{ID3289}{Hopf State Harmonic Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3289 introduces Hopf State Harmonic Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Psi_{Hopf}( \theta, \phi, \psi, t) = \sum_{k} c_k e^{ik \psi} e^{-i \omega_k t} Y_{ \ell}^m( \theta, \phi) \end{equation}
